query:
SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.consultorId, a.bypassOnboarding, a.onboardingLiberado,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assessment_pdi WHERE alunoId = a.id) as pdiCount,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM onboarding_jornada WHERE alunoId = a.id) as jornadaCount,
  u.role, u.id as userId
FROM alunos a
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.alunoId = a.id
WHERE a.name LIKE '%Joseane%' OR a.name LIKE '%joseane%'
LIMIT 5;
